selected_logical_outcome.statement: Overconfidence at all levels leads to complacency.

actions: Conduct regular feedback sessions to create awareness about blind spots and overconfidence.
Develop a culture of humility by recognizing areas for improvement.
Establish KPIs that challenge teams to move beyond comfort zones.
Implement periodic performance reviews to identify complacency.
Introduce external benchmarking against industry standards.

processing_note.rule: LLM must reason only within provided stages, logical outcome, and mapped actions
